    This class is used to parse function applications with JavaDL escapes within set statements or similar situations.

    Handles JML expressions that begin with an escape character '\'.

    RegisteredEscapeExpression

  • Uses of Operator in recoder.kit

    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type Operator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsArgument(Expression child, Operator parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttachAsArgument(Expression child, Operator parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
